## Describe the Bug

A clear description of what went wrong.

## To Reproduce

Steps to reproduce:
1. Run `sudo python3 aegismimic.py --watch /path --config config/policy.yaml`
2. Trigger with `...`
3. See error

## Expected Behaviour

What should have happened.

## Actual Behaviour

What actually happened. Include the exact log output if possible:

```
paste log output here
```
